summary: ULTRATHINK analysis of Electron/Node version crisis. Root cause: @types/node@^25.0.0 (Node 23+) incompatible with Electron 33 (Node 20). Build target node18 also mismatched. Three fix options provided.
current_status: Root cause identified, awaiting user decision
next_steps: User to choose: Option A (Electron 28/Node 18) or Option B (Electron 33/Node 20)
blockers: User decision needed on which fix to apply
